schema.rules[].auto_pickup_enabled: bool. true=agent can auto-pick this combination, false=manual assignment only.
schema.rules[].rationale: string (optional). PO-readable note shown in PWA editor.

rules.rationale: PO 直接判断必須。 agent 自動 pickup 禁止 (CLAUDE.md §1.1.2 + brief v1 §1.5)。

writer_note: PWA editor (T117) reads this file and generates po_inbox prefill requests for changes. Direct SSoT write remains ADV/Codex-side only.
